What we know so far: Supreme Leader's compound hit and Iran's retaliatory strikesIran has retaliated with a missile barrage towards Israel, while explosions have been heard in Qatar, Bahrain, Kuwait and the UAE. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cx2dyz6p3weo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cx2dyz6p3weo#1 Sat, 28 Feb 2026 17:32:26 GMT
Luxury Dubai hotel hit as Iran launches retaliatory strikes across regionSmoke and flames rose from Dubai's Fairmont The Palm hotel as civilian targets came under fire along with the US military bases across the middle east. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c204px4zddro?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c204px4zddro#1 Sat, 28 Feb 2026 18:15:02 GMT
US and Israeli strikes on Iran in mapsIsrael and the US have launched strikes across Iran, with Iran retaliating with strikes across the region. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c4g0pnnj8xyo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c4g0pnnj8xyo#1 Sat, 28 Feb 2026 18:09:59 GMT
